About

Best Office Chairs for Tall People

A curated shortlist of chairs that meet dimensional requirements for users 6 feet and taller

Selection Criteria

Included If

  • Seat height adjusts to 19"+ at maximum
  • Seat depth of 19"+ or adjustable depth
  • Back height accommodates taller torsos
  • Proven track record with tall users

Excluded If

  • • Maximum seat height under 18"
  • • Fixed, non-adjustable seat depth under 18"
  • • Back height designed for average users
  • • Insufficient long-term durability data

Herman Miller Aeron Size C

Users 6'0" to 6'6" with average to lean builds

Strengths

  • Extensive adjustability
  • Proven long-term durability
  • Excellent ventilation

Considerations

  • • Mesh may not suit all preferences
  • • Premium pricing
Read full review →

Compare This Chair

vs Steelcase Leap Plus vs Steelcase Gesture

Steelcase Leap Plus

Users 6'0" to 6'6" with larger builds, up to 500 lbs

Strengths

  • Higher weight capacity
  • Deep seat option
  • Flexible back support

Considerations

  • • Heavier unit
  • • Less ventilation than mesh
Read full review →

Compare This Chair

vs Aeron Size C vs Steelcase Gesture

Steelcase Gesture

Users 6'0" to 6'4" who use multiple devices

Strengths

  • 360° armrest movement
  • Flexible seat edge
  • Multiple sitting postures

Considerations

  • • Smaller than Leap Plus
  • • Higher price point
Read full review →

vs Leap Plus vs Aeron Size C
